hero.headline: I build resilient digital products with React, Firebase, and thoughtful UX.
hero.description: I design and ship fast, accessible product experiences with a strong focus on realtime data, frontend architecture, and polished interfaces.

about.title: Designing web experiences that feel fast, clear, and alive.
about.intro: I help teams turn product ideas into reliable applications with scalable frontend systems, realtime data, and interfaces people genuinely enjoy using.

timeline.title: Senior Frontend Engineer
timeline.description: Leading design-to-production delivery for internal tools, dashboards, and customer-facing SaaS products.

timeline.title: Frontend Developer
timeline.description: Built React applications, design systems, and analytics workflows for startups across fintech, education, and commerce.

timeline.title: UI Engineer
timeline.description: Delivered responsive marketing sites and interactive product experiences with strong animation and accessibility fundamentals.

seo.title: Your Name | Developer Portfolio
seo.description: Modern developer portfolio powered by React, Firebase Realtime Database, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion.

saas-analytics-suite.title: SaaS Analytics Suite
saas-analytics-suite.summary: A high-density analytics dashboard with realtime usage metrics, team permissions, and export workflows.
saas-analytics-suite.description: Built a polished SaaS analytics platform with React, Firebase, and chart-driven insights. The app supported role-based access, realtime KPI tracking, usage trends, and operational reporting while maintaining excellent performance on mobile and desktop.

realtime-collaboration-hub.title: Realtime Collaboration Hub
realtime-collaboration-hub.summary: A collaborative workspace with presence indicators, activity feeds, and low-latency content sync.
realtime-collaboration-hub.description: Designed and implemented a collaborative product experience centered on realtime updates, shared workspaces, and responsive interaction states. The system used Firebase for synchronization and focused heavily on clarity, performance, and operational scale.
